knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-032-Digital-Identity-Access Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: IAM-018 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: IAM-001 Identity registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Identity registration | Critical | Security. IAM-002 Joiner mover leaver | Governance | Require documented compliance: Joiner mover leaver | Critical | Security. IAM-003 MFA | Governance | Require documented compliance: MFA | Critical | Security. IAM-004 SSO | Governance | Require documented compliance: SSO | Critical | Security. IAM-005 Access request | Governance | Require documented compliance: Access request | Critical | Security. IAM-006 Manager approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Manager approval | Critical | Security. IAM-007 Role approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Role approval | Critical | Security. IAM-008 Entitlement catalog | Governance | Require documented compliance: Entitlement catalog | Critical | Security. IAM-009 SoD enforcement | Governance | Require documented compliance: SoD enforcement | Critical | Security. IAM-010 Privileged access | Governance | Require documented compliance: Privileged access | Critical | Security. IAM-011 Service identity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Service identity | Critical | Security. IAM-012 Agent identity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Agent identity | Critical | Security. IAM-013 Access certification | Governance | Require documented compliance: Access certification | Critical | Security. IAM-014 Emergency access | Governance | Require documented compliance: Emergency access | Critical | Security. IAM-015 Session logging | Governance | Require documented compliance: Session logging | Critical | Security. IAM-016 Credential rotation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Credential rotation | High | Security. IAM-017 Dormant access removal | Governance | Require documented compliance: Dormant access removal | High | Security. IAM-018 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. IAM-019 Least privilege | Governance | Require documented compliance: Least privilege | High | Security. IAM-020 Attribute validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Attribute validation | High | Security. IAM-021 Delegation expiry | Governance | Require documented compliance: Delegation expiry | High | Security. IAM-022 Access revocation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Access revocation | High | Security. IAM-023 Break-glass review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Break-glass review | High | Security. IAM-024 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Security. IAM-025 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Security.
